parameters: Oh, I remember you! I heard the demons you protected survived!
I lost most of my squad. I'm glad yours survived. Take good care
More of my squad gone, and like this... Damn it!
All my squad are gone... You did well to make it this far, guys.
I miss when we first teamed up... We all shouted, "Shock troops,
initiate the assault!" and started fighting Bohelos's soldiers.
Now it's my turn. Watch over me, everyone.
Only I survived the war. Maybe I'll put some tombstones together
for them and watch over their graves.
Now's not the time to head back into town!

I was almost killed... Or wait, wouldn't it have been better for me to
lose instead of butchering my friends?
I'm prepared to face pretty much anything, but my buddies all being
killed like that is something else.
I can finally rest now that the whole world domination thing's come
to a close... Guess I should go tell my dead buddies how it went.
This place was a sea of fire during the invasion. Looks like the
barrage of fire magic trapped a lot of demons.
There was one demon who jumped right in and took care of it!
I don't know who it was, but I owe them my life!
To think it's come to this...
The gardemon in the infirmary was my best buddy. I thought he'd
get better and we'd be able to fight together again someday.
He's gone now, so I'll just have to fight on in his memory.

My best friend died in the infirmary. I'm going to build a medical
facility a hundred times better than that one.
